facebook.caption:
751 reviews. 4.6 stars. Under $10 a bowl.

Phở bò Nam Định on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is not a tourist restaurant. It's where locals eat pho before 8am and the broth runs out by noon.

Nam Định-style means cleaner, lighter broth than the south. Beef is sliced thin. Noodles are firm. No fuss.

Get there early. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the broth hit the bowl. That's Nam Định-style pho, under $10, 4.6 stars from 751 real reviews. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Go before noon or go hungry.
